options.content:
⚡ FLXC1000 Flux Capacitor ECU

Use the SOVD API directly or demo.sh --status for live data

### Data Endpoints

```bash
# Flux Capacitor Power
curl -sH "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  http://localhost:8080/vehicle/v15/components/flxc1000/data/FluxCapacitorPowerConsumption

# VIN
curl -sH "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  http://localhost:8080/vehicle/v15/components/flxc1000/data/VINDataIdentifier

# Faults/DTCs
curl -sH "Authorization: Bearer <token>" \
  http://localhost:8080/vehicle/v15/components/flxc1000/faults
```

### FLXC1000 Configuration

| Property | Value |
|:---|:---|
| **ECU Address** | 0x1000 |
| **Variant** | FLXC1000_App_0101 |
| **VIN** | WFLXC1000TIMEMACH |

### DIDs
- F100: Identification
- F186: Session
- F190: VIN
- F200: FluxCapacitorPower

### DTCs
- 6 diagnostic trouble codes
